label: Layout room
description: Defines a room archetype for structure layout generation, including terrain, scattered contents, prefab placements, and room part applications.

sketchResolverDef.label: Sketch resolver
sketchResolverDef.description: SketchResolverDef used to resolve this room's sketch during generation.

areaSizeRange.label: Area size range
areaSizeRange.description: Allowed room area in cells. Rooms outside this range cannot use this def.

requiresSingleRectRoom.label: Requires single rect room
requiresSingleRectRoom.description: When true, this def is only used in rooms composed of exactly one rectangle.

floorTypes.label: Floor types
floorTypes.description: Terrain types randomly chosen for the room floor. Inherit='false' is preserved on the container element when present.

edgeTerrain.label: Edge terrain
edgeTerrain.description: TerrainDef placed along the inner edge cells of the room.

minSingleRectWidth.label: Min single rect width
minSingleRectWidth.description: Minimum width of the largest single rectangle that must fit inside the room.

minSingleRectHeight.label: Min single rect height
minSingleRectHeight.description: Minimum height of the largest single rectangle that must fit inside the room.

roomContentsWorkerType.label: Room contents worker type
roomContentsWorkerType.description: C# RoomContentsWorker subclass responsible for populating this room's contents.

canBeInMixedRoom.label: Can be in mixed room
canBeInMixedRoom.description: Whether this room type can coexist with other room types in a merged room.

dontPlaceRandomly.label: Don't place randomly
dontPlaceRandomly.description: When true, this room type is never chosen randomly; it must be explicitly required.

isValidPlayerSpawnRoom.label: Is valid player spawn room
isValidPlayerSpawnRoom.description: Whether this room type is a valid spawn location for the player.

dontDestroyWallsDoors.label: Don't destroy walls and doors
dontDestroyWallsDoors.description: When true, the room generator will not remove existing walls or doors in this room.

threatPointsScaleCurve.label: Threat points scale curve
threatPointsScaleCurve.description: Curve mapping threat points to a scale factor applied when populating this room.

minConnectedRooms.label: Min connected rooms
minConnectedRooms.description: Minimum number of other rooms this room must be connected to.

minAdjRooms.label: Min adjacent rooms
minAdjRooms.description: Minimum number of rooms that must share a cardinal edge with this room.

spawnJunk.label: Spawn junk
spawnJunk.description: Whether junk items are scattered into this room during generation.

canMergeWithAdjacentRoom.label: Can merge with adjacent room
canMergeWithAdjacentRoom.description: Whether this room can be merged with a directly adjacent room.

canRemoveBorderDoors.label: Can remove border doors
canRemoveBorderDoors.description: Whether doors on this room's border may be removed during generation.

canRemoveBorderWalls.label: Can remove border walls
canRemoveBorderWalls.description: Whether walls on this room's border may be removed during generation.

roofDef.label: Roof def
roofDef.description: RoofDef placed over this room. Omit to use the structure default.

noRoof.label: No roof
noRoof.description: When true, no roof is placed over this room.

itemsPer100CellsRange.label: Items per 100 cells range
itemsPer100CellsRange.description: Range for how many items are generated per 100 room cells. Absent means no item generation.

thingSetMakerDef.label: Thing set maker
thingSetMakerDef.description: ThingSetMakerDef used to generate items placed in this room.

scatter.label: Scatter
scatter.description: Things scattered randomly throughout the room. Each element name is the ThingDef defName.

scatterTerrain.label: Scatter terrain
scatterTerrain.description: Terrain patches scattered randomly throughout the room. Each element name is the TerrainDef defName.

fillEdges.label: Fill edges
fillEdges.description: Things placed along the room's interior edges. Each element name is the ThingDef defName.

fillInterior.label: Fill interior
fillInterior.description: Things placed across the room interior. Each element name is the ThingDef defName.

wallAttachments.label: Wall attachments
wallAttachments.description: Things attached to the room walls. Each element name is the ThingDef defName.

prefabs.label: Prefabs
prefabs.description: Prefabs placed inside the room. Each element name is the PrefabDef defName.

parts.label: Parts
parts.description: Room parts applied during content resolution. Each element name is the RoomPartDef defName; scalar text is the chance.
